---
title: "Ungleiche Emissionen"
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: false
  output: true
  warning: false
  error: true
  include: true
---


```{r}
#| echo: false
source("src/00_libs.R")

read_excel("data/emissions-data.xlsx") |>
  pivot_longer(2:11) |>
  mutate(
    value = round(value),
    # nIso = round(value/1000)
    ) |>
  filter(
    name %in% c(
      "Food",
      "Housing",
      "Energy",
      "Mobility",
      "Goods",
      "Services"
    )
  ) |>
  filter(
    Quantile %in% c(1, 5)
  ) |>
  write_csv("data/data.csv") 
```


{{< include src/00_config.qmd >}}
{{< include src/00_libs.qmd >}}
{{< include src/00_utils.qmd >}}
{{< include src/01_isotype.qmd  >}}

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
data = FileAttachment("data/data.csv").csv({ typed: true })
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
makeIsotype({ data: data })
  .render({ renderer: "svg" })
```

<!-- 
## Colors

```{ojs}
html`
<div class="logo-container-styleguide">
  ${colors_burger.map(color => html`
    <div class="swatches">
      <div 
        title="${color}" 
        style="
          margin-bottom: 1em;
          width: 24px; 
          height: 24px; 
          background-color: ${color}; 
          border: 0.75px solid black;"
      >
      </div>
      <div>${color}</div>
      <div>${hexToRgb(color)}</div>
    </div>
  `)}
</div>`
``` -->
